landing.heroTitle: Care that travels with your family
landing.heroSubtitle: Petit Stay connects luxury hotels with vetted childcare specialists, so you can enjoy your stay while your little ones are in trusted hands.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Every detail is crafted to give parents confidence and children joy during hotel stays.
landing.feature1Desc: Every childcare specialist undergoes rigorous background checks, certification verification, and ongoing performance reviews. Only the top professionals join our network.
landing.feature2Desc: Partnered with luxury hotels across Asia to provide childcare in safe, child-friendly environments with age-appropriate amenities and safety protocols.
landing.feature3Desc: Stay connected with live session updates, activity timelines, and instant notifications. Our Trust Protocol ensures complete transparency throughout every session.
landing.step1Desc: Browse our network of premium partner hotels and select the perfect location for your stay.
landing.step2Desc: Choose a certified childcare specialist, pick your time, and complete our Trust Protocol check-in.
landing.step3Desc: Relax knowing your children are in expert hands with real-time updates and 24/7 support.
landing.testimonial1Quote: Petit Stay transformed our hotel experience. The sitter was incredible with our kids, and the live updates gave us complete peace of mind during dinner.
landing.testimonial2Quote: The Trust Protocol check-in made us feel so secure. We could see every activity in real-time. It's the gold standard in hotel childcare.
landing.testimonial3Quote: Since partnering with Petit Stay, our guest satisfaction scores for families have increased by 40%. It's become our most requested service.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to elevate your family's hotel experience?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of premium hotels and thousands of families who trust Petit Stay for exceptional childcare.
landing.footerTagline: Premium hotel childcare infrastructure for the world's best hospitality brands.
landing.footerCopyright: Tokyo · Seoul · Singapore. All rights reserved.

about.title: About Petit Stay
about.subtitle: Premium in-hotel childcare, reimagined.
about.missionDesc: Petit Stay connects luxury hotels with vetted, certified childcare specialists — giving traveling families peace of mind and giving hotels a premium amenity that delights guests and drives loyalty.
about.howWeWorkDesc: Hotels partner with Petit Stay to offer on-demand babysitting through our concierge platform. Guest families book through the hotel or directly via our app. Every specialist is background-checked, first-aid certified, and trained in hospitality service standards.
about.bullet4: Comprehensive liability coverage on every booking
about.whereDesc: Petit Stay currently serves premium hotels across Asia-Pacific, with active operations in Tokyo, Seoul, and Singapore. We are expanding to additional markets throughout 2026.
about.teamDesc: Founded by hospitality and childcare professionals, our team combines deep experience in luxury hotel operations, early childhood education, and technology platform design.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Help us redefine family hospitality.
careers.whyDesc: We are building the trust infrastructure for in-hotel childcare across Asia-Pacific. If you care about safety, hospitality, and making family travel better, we would love to hear from you.
careers.job1Desc: React, TypeScript, real-time systems. Remote (Asia-Pacific timezone).
careers.job2Desc: Build and manage relationships with luxury hotel partners in Japan.
careers.job3Desc: Recruit, vet, and train childcare specialists for the Korean market.
careers.job4Desc: Design trust-centered experiences for parents, sitters, and hotel staff.
careers.applyEmail: Send your resume and a brief note about why you are interested to careers@petitstay.com. We review every application and aim to respond within five business days.

press.title: Press
press.subtitle: News and media resources.
press.news1Desc: Expanding premium in-hotel childcare to Southeast Asia with three flagship hotel partners.
press.news2Title: New Partnership with Luxury Hotel Group
press.news2Desc: Petit Stay partners with a leading luxury hotel group to bring childcare to 12 properties across Asia.
press.mediaKitDesc: For logos, brand guidelines, and high-resolution images, please contact our communications team at press@petitstay.com.
press.inquiriesDesc: Journalists and media professionals can reach us at press@petitstay.com. We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Frequently asked questions and support.
help.a1: Hotels partner with Petit Stay to offer on-demand childcare. Guests can book through the hotel concierge or our app. A vetted specialist arrives at the hotel, checks in via QR code, and parents can monitor the session in real time.
help.a2: Yes. Every specialist undergoes a comprehensive background check, holds valid first-aid and CPR certifications, and completes our hospitality training program before accepting any bookings.
help.a3: We support children from 6 months to 12 years of age. Specialists are matched based on the children's ages and any special requirements noted during booking.
help.a4: Every booking includes comprehensive liability insurance covering both the child and the specialist for the duration of the session.
help.a5: Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the scheduled start time. Late cancellations may incur a fee depending on the hotel partner's policy.
help.a6: The platform is available in English, Korean, Japanese, and Chinese. Specialists are matched based on language preferences whenever possible.
help.contactDesc: Could not find what you were looking for? Reach out to our support team at support@petitstay.com or use the in-app chat feature. We are available 24/7 during active sessions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, phone number, and payment details when you create an account or make a booking. We also collect information about children (age, special needs) to match appropriate specialists.
privacy.section2Content: To process and manage bookings between families, hotels, and specialists; To verify specialist qualifications and background checks; To send booking confirmations, session updates, and safety notifications; To improve our services through aggregated, anonymized analytics; To comply with legal obligations and resolve disputes.
privacy.section3Content: We share relevant booking details with hotel partners and assigned specialists to facilitate services. We do not sell personal information to third parties. We may share data with service providers who assist in platform operations (payment processing, cloud hosting, background check services).
privacy.section4Content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit and at rest, access controls, and regular security audits. Session monitoring data is encrypted and retained only for the duration required by applicable law.
privacy.section5Content: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data. Contact us at privacy@petitstay.com to exercise these rights.
privacy.section6Content: We use essential cookies to maintain sessions and preferences. Analytics cookies are used only with your consent and can be disabled in your browser settings.
privacy.section7Content: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification at least 30 days before they take effect.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The agreement between you and Petit Stay.
terms.section1Content: By accessing or using the Petit Stay platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.section2Content: Petit Stay provides a technology platform connecting hotel partners with vetted childcare specialists on behalf of guest families. We facilitate bookings, payments, and real-time session monitoring. Petit Stay is not itself a childcare provider.
terms.section3Content: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your credentials and for all activity under your account.
terms.section4Content: Bookings are confirmed once a specialist accepts and the hotel approves; Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the session; Late cancellations may incur a fee as specified at booking time; Petit Stay reserves the right to cancel bookings for safety reasons.
terms.section5Content: Pricing is displayed at booking time and includes the specialist fee, platform fee, and applicable taxes. Payments are processed securely through our payment partners. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis.
terms.section6Content: All users must maintain a safe and respectful environment. Specialists must follow Petit Stay's safety protocols and hospitality standards. Any violation may result in immediate suspension of the account.
terms.section7Content: Every session is covered by comprehensive liability insurance. Petit Stay's total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount paid for the relevant booking. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
terms.section8Content: These terms are governed by the laws of Singapore. Any disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration in Singapore, except where prohibited by applicable law.
terms.section9Content: We may modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance. Material changes will be communicated at least 30 days in advance.
